sys_script_include.description:
2.7 STRY0104389 - There is an error in the DIA log related to the function - GetUserDefaultOU - org.mozilla.javascript.EcmaError: The undefined value has no properties.
2.5 P3 STRY0087458 - DTLV - Response log
Checks to see if the user given is in the organizational unit provided. Requires user and Organizational Unit to be provided and returns true or false.
sys_script_include.name: ClientUserInfoScripts
